info.name: EM Furniture & Interior API
info.description:
Complete API collection for EM Furniture and Interior e-commerce platform.

Authentication uses cookie-based JWT (set automatically on login).

Set the `baseUrl` variable to your server URL (default: http://localhost:5000).

exec: // Cookie is set automatically by the server

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Modern Sofa",
  "description": "A beautiful modern sofa",
  "price": 250000,
  "category": "sofas",
  "style": "modern",
  "items": ["3-seater sofa"],
  "isBestSeller": false,
  "isPromo": false
}

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('blogId', jsonData._id);

body.raw:
{ "title": "Interior Design Tips 2025", "content": "

Here are the top trends...

", "excerpt": "Top interior design trends", "tags": ["design", "trends"], "status": "published" }

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('faqId', jsonData._id);

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Jane Doe",
  "email": "jane@example.com",
  "phoneNumber": "08098765432",
  "subject": "Inquiry about custom furniture",
  "message": "I'd like to discuss a custom order for my living room."
}

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('couponId', jsonData._id);
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData.consultation && jsonData.consultation._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('consultationId', jsonData.consultation._id);

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Jane Doe",
  "email": "jane@example.com",
  "phone": "08098765432",
  "budgetMin": 500000,
  "budgetMax": 2000000,
  "stylePreferences": ["modern", "minimalist"],
  "notes": "Need help with living room design"
}

exec: var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData.designer && jsonData.designer._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('designerId', jsonData.designer._id);
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData.banner && jsonData.banner._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('bannerId', jsonData.banner._id);
var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData.flashSale && jsonData.flashSale._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('flashSaleId', jsonData.flashSale._id);
